verses.1: “Hey! Come, everyone who thirsts, to the waters!
verses.2: Why do you spend money for that which is not bread,
verses.3: Turn your ear, and come to me.
verses.4: Behold, I have given him for a witness to the peoples,
verses.5: Behold, you shall call a nation that you don’t know;
verses.6: Seek the LORD while he may be found.
verses.7: Let the wicked forsake his way,
verses.8: “For my thoughts are not your thoughts,
verses.9: “For as the heavens are higher than the earth,
verses.10: For as the rain comes down and the snow from the sky,
verses.11: so is my word that goes out of my mouth:
verses.12: For you shall go out with joy,
verses.13: Instead of the thorn the cypress tree will come up;
